bug_report.summary: Right-side scrollbar thumb/track renders differently (position/appearance) with no user interaction
steps_to_reproduce: Open the File menu (as in the screenshot state).
expected_behaviors: Scrollbar thumbs/track should remain visually consistent (same position/size/appearance) between builds when no scrolling occurs.
actual_behaviors: A small right-side scrollbar region changes between before/after (bbox ~[895,536]-[905,582]), suggesting the scrollbar thumb/track position or rendering differs despite identical UI state.
